final:
// Clock Divider - ratio 4
module ALU (
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input [2:0] control,
    output reg [7:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            3'b000: result = A & B;  // AND
            3'b001: result = A | B;  // OR
            3'b010: result = A + B;  // ADD
            3'b011: result = A - B;  // SUB
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;  // XOR
            default: result = 8'b00000000; // default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
